title: Banana Smoke from T Spawn
summary: Smoke banana to push B site safely from T side

position.caption: Stand at T spawn near banana entrance

aim.caption: Aim at the top of the building on banana

position: Go to the far left wall near banana entrance
aim: Look up toward the building at top banana
Aim at the rooftop corner edge
Slight left adjustment

throw.timingNote: Throw at round start for banana control

title: CT Smoke from Banana
summary: Smoke CT position on B site from banana approach

aim.caption: Aim at the chimney on CT building

effect.caption: CT is smoked off from B site

position: Stand at the right side wall
aim: Look at the chimney on the CT building rooftop
Aim at the left side of the chimney base

title: B Site Car Molotov from Banana
summary: Molotov the car position to clear CT from B site car

aim.caption: Aim at the car on B site

effect.caption: Car position is cleared by fire

position: Stand at the corner near the sandbags
aim: Look directly at the car
Aim at the roof of the car
Lower angle than you think

text: Molotov lands on and around the car
throw.timingNote: Throw after CT smoke, before pushing

title: A Site Apartments Smoke
summary: Smoke the A site apartments exit to push A from library

position.caption: Stand at library near arch entrance

aim.caption: Aim at the arch above apartments exit

position: Stand at the arch entrance from T side
aim: Look up at the apartments building
Aim at the upper corner of the apartments exit archway

throw.timingNote: Throw in coordination with team A execute

title: Boiler Flash from Banana
summary: Flash to blind the CT holding boiler from banana push

position.caption: Stand at mid banana near the wall

aim.caption: Aim at the boiler room ledge

position: Stand behind the first piece of cover
aim: Look at the boiler room rooftop edge
Aim just above the rooftop corner

text: Flash will pop inside boiler area
throw.timingNote: Use when teammate calls boiler CT

title: A Site CT Smoke from T Side
summary: Smoke off CT position during A site execute from library

position.caption: Stand at library wall near T entrance

aim.caption: Aim at the specific ledge on CT building

effect.caption: CT position on A site is blocked

position: Stand at the precise corner of the left wall
aim: Look up at CT building rooftop
Aim at the very edge of the parapet wall
This is a pixel-level lineup

text: Any deviation will miss the lineup
throw.timingNote: Practice extensively before using in match

title: Top Banana HE from T Spawn
summary: HE to damage CTs holding top banana from T spawn

position.caption: Stand at T spawn far left corner

position: Go to the far left corner
aim: Look up at about 45 degrees
Aim above the banana wall top
Slight overshoot is better

text: Grenade arcs over and bursts at top banana
throw.timingNote: Throw before walking to banana to damage CT

title: B Short Retake Flash
summary: CT flash from B short to blind T side during retake

position.caption: Stand at B short entrance near the stairs

aim.caption: Aim above the B site wall

effect.caption: T side on B site is blinded

position: Move to B short from CT spawn
Position at the bottom of short stairs
aim: Look up toward B site over the wall
Aim at the sky above the site

title: Pit Smoke for B Execute
summary: Smoke the pit area during B site execute from banana

position.caption: Stand at lower banana near the arch

aim.caption: Aim at the left corner of the arch roof

position: Push to lower banana arch area
Stand in the center of the arch opening
aim: Look at the left edge of the arch rooftop
Aim at the very corner of the stone edge

text: Smoke will roll into pit area
throw.timingNote: Throw in sync with team execute

title: A Apartments Molotov from CT
summary: Molotov thrown into A apartments to delay T push

position.caption: Stand at CT A site near pillar

effect.caption: Apartments lower entry is on fire

position: Start at CT A site default
aim: Look up at the apartments roof overhang
Aim just above the rooftop edge

text: Molotov will land at apartments lower exit
throw.timingNote: Throw when you hear apartments movement
